fy.d:
interj. A word which expresses blame, dislike, disapprobation,
   abhorrence, or contempt. See Fie.

fyce.t: n. <美> 小狗, 无用的人, 坏脾气的人

fye.t: 呸!咄![表示轻蔑.不高兴等]

fyffe.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 法伊夫 Fyfe的变体

fyi.t:
供参考
[计] 为你所用之信息

fyke.d:
n. A long bag net distended by hoops, into which fish can pass
   easily, without being able to return; -- called also fyke net.

fyldes.t: (fylde 的复数)  [地名] [英国] 法尔德（地区）

fynbos.t: n. 高山硬叶灌木群落

fyned.t: (Fyn 的过去分词) 菲英岛[丹麦中南部]

fynes.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 法因斯 Fiennes的变体

fynest.t: (Fyn 的最高级) 菲英岛[丹麦中南部]

fyr.t: abbr. for your reference 供参考

fytte.d:
n. See Fit a song.
   G () G is the seventh letter of the English alphabet, and a vocal
   consonant. It has two sounds; one simple, as in gave, go, gull; the
   other compound (like that of j), as in gem, gin, dingy. See Guide to
   Pronunciation, // 231-6, 155, 176, 178, 179, 196, 211, 246.

fyzabad.t: 法扎巴德(印度-城市亦作Faizabad)
